entry.title: New: RES24-214 (Honolulu) — CCL
entry.content:
AUTHORIZING THE EXECUTION OF AN ASSIGNMENT AND EXTENSION OF LEASE, CONSENT, AND AMENDMENT OF LEASE OF CITY PROPERTY; ASSIGNMENT AND ASSUMPTION OF PARKING LICENSE AGREEMENT, CONSENT, AND AMENDMENT TO PARKING LICENSE AGREEMENT (163 SPACES); AND ASSIGNMENT AND ASSUMPTION OF PARKING LICENSE AGREEMENT, CONSENT, AND AMENDMENT TO PARKING LICENSE AGREEMENT (8 HANDICAPPED SPACES) FOR THE SMITHBERETANIA APARTMENTS AFFORDABLE HOUSING PROJECT LOCATED AT 1170 NU‘UANU AVENUE, HONOLULU, O‘AHU, TAX MAP KEY (1) 1-7-004:007.

Latest action: Adopted.

View on the council site
